backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for a moderation system with users, moderators, warnings, reports, and applications. Includes admin/moderator authorization checks via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (floating music player, settings page, app layout mounting) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Scrambly Moderator App, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app using TanStack Router with routes for home, admin, moderator, status, and settings pages, each wrapped in appropriate auth/admin guards, with FloatingMusicPlayer and ProfileSetupModal mounted in the persistent RootLayout.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicPla: Fixed bottom-right floating music player widget rendered only for authenticated users, providing track navigation, power toggle, volume slider with nudge buttons, and a collapse toggle, all driven by the useMusicPlayer hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing the app shell with a sticky header, navigation links, and login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication. Renders different nav items based on whether the user is an admin, a regular authenticated user, or unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/ModeratorApplica: Modal dialog that walks users through a Sonic-themed quiz to apply for moderator status, with an intentional trap question that triggers a fallback/redirect path and detects if the user searches for the answer.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name and username to create their profile before proceeding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token when present and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicPlayer.ts: Custom hook that manages a YouTube IFrame API-based music player with track list, volume, play/pause state, and session persistence, using a singleton player instance shared across hook instances.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, roles, moderators, warnings, reports, appeals, and moderator applications, with toast notifications on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark theme, and adds utility classes for custom colors and glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccessDenied.tsx: Simple page component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed UI for managing users, moderators, reports, appeals, and moderator applications, using form state and mutation hooks for all admin actions.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page that shows platform features, a login button for unauthenticated users, and role-based navigation links (admin panel, moderator dashboard, apply modal) for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ModeratorDashboard.ts: Moderator dashboard that lists all users with inline forms to issue warnings, ban users with a reason, or instantly ban for pornographic content, with status badges and search filtering.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page component that provides a Background Music section allowing users to toggle music on/off, adjust volume, browse/select Sonic-themed tracks, and add custom YouTube tracks by URL.
frontend/src/pages/UserStatus.tsx: User status page that displays the current user's ban/warning status, allows submission of ban appeals, and lets users report moderators to the admin.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 15) describing the Scrambly moderator application's architecture, feature list, role hierarchy, known issues, and design decisions such as the Sonic-themed survey and floating music player.
